metadata.technical_focus: Full-stack, Cloud, DevOps, Data, Security, Infrastructure

resumes.professional_summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 8+ years building scalable distributed systems. Started as a QA engineer - found my way into development after automating manual tests. Strong background in Go, Java, and Python. I've built systems handling 100k+ RPS and databases at 10TB scale. Not the typical CS grad (studied physics originally), which gives me a different perspective on problem-solving. Looking for a role where I can mentor junior devs while still writing code daily.

education.thesis_title: Optimizing Query Performance in Distributed Databases using Learned Index Structures

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Lead backend development for 3 microservices handling 1M+ daily requests
Design and implement REST and gRPC APIs
Mentor 4 junior engineers
Lead architecture reviews and technical design documents
On-call rotation for production systems
technical_achievements: Reduced API response time by 60% (from 250ms to 100ms) by implementing Redis caching with LRU eviction
Migrated 15 services from monolithic architecture to microservices using Kafka for event-driven communication
Fixed a memory leak in Go service that caused weekly OOM kills - previous team had been chasing it for 2 years
Implemented circuit breaker pattern using Resilience4j that prevented cascading failures during downstream outage
Optimized PostgreSQL queries using indexing strategy reducing full table scans by 80%

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built REST APIs for mobile and web clients
Set up CI/CD pipeline from scratch using Jenkins
Database schema design and optimization
technical_achievements: Scaled database from 10GB to 500GB with zero downtime using horizontal sharding
Implemented JWT-based authentication with refresh token rotation
Set up read replicas for analytics queries, reducing load on primary by 40%
Built rate limiting middleware using token bucket algorithm

work_experience.title: QA Engineer (transitioned to Dev)
technical_achievements: Wrote 200+ automated test scripts using Selenium WebDriver, reducing regression testing time from 2 days to 4 hours
Built test reporting dashboard using Allure
Implemented API contract testing using Postman/Newman
Taught myself Python during lunch breaks and built automation framework from scratch

resumes.professional_summary: DevOps Engineer who actually likes infrastructure (yes, we exist). 6 years experience building CI/CD pipelines, managing Kubernetes clusters, and automating everything that moves. Got into tech through a coding bootcamp after working as a sysadmin for 3 years. Strong believer in 'if you do something twice, automate it'. Currently helping teams adopt GitOps practices with ArgoCD. Looking for a role where I can work on multi-cloud architecture and platform engineering.

work_experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
responsibilities: Manage 12 Kubernetes clusters across dev/staging/prod environments
Design and implement infrastructure as code using Terraform
Lead GitOps adoption using ArgoCD
Capacity planning and cost optimization
On-call rotation for platform incidents
technical_achievements: Reduced deployment time from 30 minutes to 5 minutes by optimizing CI/CD pipelines and implementing parallel builds
Implemented Karpenter for auto-scaling, saving $40k/year in EC2 costs by right-sizing nodes
Created internal Terraform modules used by 20+ engineering teams
Set up Prometheus + Grafana stack with 200+ dashboards and 500+ alerts
Implemented Vault for secrets management, eliminating hardcoded credentials

work_experience.title: DevOps Engineer
responsibilities: Maintained 200+ Linux servers (Ubuntu, CentOS, RHEL)
Automated backup and recovery processes using Ansible playbooks
Managed AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, VPC, IAM)
technical_achievements: Migrated on-premise infrastructure to AWS - project took 8 months with zero downtime
Set up monitoring with Nagios that caught a security breach attempt within 2 minutes
Automated server provisioning reducing setup time from 2 days to 30 minutes
Implemented log aggregation using ELK stack for 200+ servers

resumes.professional_summary: Data Scientist with a PhD in Statistics and 5 years industry experience. I love finding patterns in messy data. Started my career in academia (published 8 papers) but wanted real-world impact. Specialize in recommendation systems, customer analytics, and causal inference. Not the typical 'just run models' data scientist - I actually enjoy data engineering and MLOps too. Built ML platforms serving 10M+ predictions daily. Looking for a senior DS role where I can both build models and help shape data strategy.

education.dissertation_title: Bayesian Methods for High-Dimensional Recommender Systems with Sparse Feedback

work_experience.title: Senior Data Scientist
responsibilities: Lead data science initiatives for customer personalization and recommendation
Mentor 3 junior data scientists and 2 ML engineers
Design and analyze A/B tests for product features
Build and maintain ML pipelines for model training and deployment
technical_achievements: Built collaborative filtering + neural network hybrid recommendation engine that increased click-through rate by 35% (from 2.1% to 2.8%)
Reduced model training time from 8 hours to 45 minutes by implementing distributed training with Horovod
Saved $500k annually by optimizing inventory forecasting - prevented overstock on 200+ SKUs using XGBoost
Implemented two-tower neural network for real-time personalization serving 500k requests/second
Built causal inference model that identified $2M in incremental revenue from marketing campaigns

work_experience.title: Data Scientist
technical_achievements: Developed fraud detection model using XGBoost that reduced false positives by 40% (from 5% to 3%)
Created customer churn prediction model identifying at-risk customers with 85% precision and 82% recall
The fraud model caught a $2M fraud ring in its first month of deployment
Built automated A/B testing platform that reduced experiment analysis time from 1 week to 1 day

resumes.professional_summary: Site Reliability Engineer with 7+ years of experience ensuring high availability and performance for large-scale distributed systems. Expert in SLI/SLO definition, error budgeting, capacity planning, and incident management. Proven track record of achieving 99.99%+ uptime for services handling 1M+ QPS. Strong background in observability, chaos engineering, and performance optimization. Seeking Senior SRE role at hyper-scale organization.

work_experience.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
achievements: Achieved 99.99% availability for services processing 1M+ requests per second
Defined SLIs and SLOs for 50+ microservices with 99.9% error budget adherence
Reduced MTTD from 5 minutes to 30 seconds through improved observability
Reduced MTTR from 30 minutes to 8 minutes via automated runbooks
Implemented chaos engineering practices that uncovered 15+ latent failure modes

resumes.professional_summary: Cybersecurity Engineer with 5 years experience in threat detection, incident response, and vulnerability management. Got into security after my own Instagram got hacked in college - decided I wanted to be on the other side. I'm passionate about blue team defense, threat hunting, and security automation. Currently studying for OSCP (failed it once already but trying again). Looking for a role where I can do more forensic analysis and malware reverse engineering.

education.capstone_project: Built a SIEM using ELK stack for a simulated corporate network with 10,000+ endpoints

work_experience.title: Cybersecurity Engineer
responsibilities: Monitor SIEM for suspicious activity across 5,000+ endpoints
Lead incident response for security events and breaches
Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing
Develop security automation playbooks
technical_achievements: Detected and contained a ransomware attack within 45 minutes - saved company from potential $5M loss
Reduced mean time to detect (MTTD) from 4 hours to 30 minutes
Created threat intelligence feeds that blocked 10,000+ malicious IPs
Automated phishing response using SOAR, reducing analyst workload by 60%
Conducted red team exercises that identified 12 critical vulnerabilities

work_experience.title: Junior Security Analyst
technical_achievements: Triaged 500+ security alerts daily with 98% accuracy
Assisted in security audits that led to ISO27001 certification
Created security awareness training used by 500+ employees

resumes.professional_summary: Results-driven Cloud Architect with 10+ years of experience designing and implementing scalable cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Expert in cloud migration, infrastructure automation, and cost optimization. Proven track record of reducing cloud spend by 30-40% while improving performance. Strong background in DevOps practices, container orchestration, and serverless architectures. Seeking Principal Cloud Architect position at enterprise-scale organization.

work_experience.title: Principal Cloud Architect
achievements: Designed multi-region, multi-cloud architecture achieving 99.99% uptime across 3 regions
Reduced cloud costs by 35% ($1.2M annually) through reserved instance planning, right-sizing, and spot instances
Led migration of 200+ applications to Kubernetes with zero downtime
Architected disaster recovery solution with 15-minute RPO and 1-hour RTO
Implemented FinOps framework adopted by 20+ engineering teams

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert

resumes.professional_summary: Full Stack Developer who actually cares about accessibility (I'm that person who tests with screen readers). 6 years experience with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python. Started as a graphic designer, learned to code because I wanted to build what I designed. I've led accessibility initiatives at two companies and helped both achieve WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Looking for a senior full-stack role where I can work on design systems and performance optimization.

work_experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
achievements: Built design system component library used by 20+ products, reducing UI development time by 50%
Improved Lighthouse score from 72 to 96 (accessibility from 65 to 98)
Migrated legacy codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript - 15k lines of code, zero production bugs
Implemented server-side rendering with Next.js, reducing FCP from 2.5s to 0.8s

resumes.professional_summary: MLOps Engineer bridging the gap between data science and production. 4 years experience deploying and scaling ML models in production environments. Expertise in ML pipelines, model serving, feature stores, and model monitoring. Built infrastructure serving 10M+ predictions daily. Seeking role where I can build ML platforms and mentor data scientists on production best practices.

work_experience.title: MLOps Engineer
achievements: Built ML platform serving 50+ models with average inference latency under 50ms
Implemented feature store (Feast) reducing feature engineering time by 70%
Set up model monitoring that detected data drift within 2 hours
Automated model retraining pipeline reducing manual effort by 90%

resumes.professional_summary: Database Administrator who actually likes writing complex SQL queries. 8 years experience with PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, and MongoDB. Started as a data analyst, moved into DBA work because I wanted more control over performance. I've managed databases from 10GB to 50TB, handled replication, backup/recovery, and disaster recovery. Not afraid of being on-call (ask me about the time I restored a database from a corrupted backup at 3am).

work_experience.title: Senior Database Administrator
achievements: Manage 50+ production databases totaling 50TB across PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB
Improved query performance by 80% for top 10 slowest queries using index optimization
Implemented point-in-time recovery (PITR) that saved the company during an accidental DELETE
Set up streaming replication with 5-second RPO and 15-minute RTO
Automated backup verification reducing restore test time from 1 week to 2 hours

resumes.professional_summary: Network Engineer with 7 years experience - no degree, just certs and real work. Started at an ISP doing residential support, worked my way up to enterprise networking. I've designed networks for hospitals, schools, and data centers. Got my CCIE last year after failing twice (that exam is brutal). I understand routing protocols, switching, firewalls, wireless, and SD-WAN. Looking for a lead network engineer role.

work_experience.title: Senior Network Engineer
achievements: Design and maintain network for 5,000+ users across 12 locations
Designed SD-WAN architecture (Cisco Viptela) that reduced MPLS costs by 40% ($200k/year)
Upgraded core network from 1G to 100G with zero downtime (6 months of planning)
Configured Palo Alto firewall rules that blocked 99.9% of intrusion attempts
Implemented EVPN-VXLAN for data center fabric

resumes.professional_summary: Technical Project Manager with 9 years experience leading software development projects. Started as a software engineer (Python/Java) for 4 years before moving into management. I speak both 'business' and 'engineering' fluently. Certified Scrum Master and PMP. Have delivered 20+ projects on time and under budget, ranging from $500k to $5M. Looking for Senior TPM role where I can lead complex, multi-team initiatives.

work_experience.title: Senior Technical Project Manager

Delivered project $5M, 18-month timeline - completed on time and $200k under budget
Reduced project delivery cycle time by 35% through process improvements
Implemented OKRs and KPIs tracking for 10+ concurrent projects

resumes.professional_summary: Embedded Systems Engineer with 6 years experience developing firmware for IoT devices, automotive systems, and consumer electronics. Expert in C/C++, RTOS, and ARM architecture. Strong background in low-level drivers, bootloaders, and communication protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, CAN). Proven track record of shipping products from concept to production. Seeking senior embedded role at innovative hardware company.

work_experience.title: Senior Embedded Engineer
achievements: Developed firmware for smart home devices deployed to 500k+ units
Implemented OTA update system with 99.9% success rate
Reduced power consumption by 60% through deep sleep optimization
Debugged and fixed intermittent CAN bus issue causing field failures
